channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Corporate Tax Statistics 2026
item.description: Corporate Tax Statistics 2026 by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Tuesday 21 July 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: OECD Economic Surveys: Hungary 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Hungary 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 23 July 2026 at 10:00.
item.oe:directorate: Economics Department

item.description: Interoperability in healthcare - Towards an interconnected future by Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs has an embargo on Friday 24 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: Density scenarios and urban expansion in Africa towards 2050
item.description: Density scenarios and urban expansion in Africa towards 2050 by Sahel and West Africa Club has an embargo on Friday 24 July 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: ​Recent policy developments on AI in the labour market
item.description: ​Recent policy developments on AI in the labour market by Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs has an embargo on Friday 24 July 2026 at 0:01.
